appliedPrinciples: put file transport under one File menu
keep review evidence and apply intent under Review
use capability-bounded labels instead of broad format claims
designEvidence.reportLimit: FREE_REPORT_DAILY_LIMIT reached; no retry and no fabricated report

menu snapshot create, artifact export, and promotion lock verification

validation.command: OSS policy, MVP boundary, generic SAST, and production dependency audit

nonClaims: No DOCX fidelity expansion is introduced.
DOCX Review remains evidence only; comments are previewed and tracked changes remain diagnostic.
Review Packet import does not auto-apply and remains explicit exact-text Apply only.
No HTML, CSS, visual-system, storage, IPC authority, dependency, cloud, network, Word, or Google support change is introduced.
This contour does not by itself publish the unified Capability Matrix or claim FEATURE_COMPLETE_V1.
